description:
Offered: fall, spring, and summer
The course examines principles of molecular, cellular, and genetics biology. Topics include biomolecules, cell structure and function, and information processing and inheritance. The laboratory emphasizes the scientific method through experimentation.
Note: Biology majors must earn a grade of 2.0 or higher in this course in order to continue in the major.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): PL, SI
